query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS research (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  content TEXT,
  file_url TEXT,
  file_type TEXT,
  file_name TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS research (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  content TEXT,
  file_url TEXT,
  file_type TEXT,
  file_name TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);
